mapper.sql: id, role_id, role_code, role_name, tenant_id, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.tenant_id, r.status, r.remark, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.create_by, r.update_by FROM auth_role r INNER JOIN auth_user_role ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT
FROM auth_role WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
